metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for Pappardelle — the TUI for multi-clauding without losing your marbles. Includes skills for installing, updating, and configuring Pappardelle.

plugins.name: pappardelle
plugins.description: Install, update, and configure Pappardelle workspaces. Provides /init-pappardelle (interactive setup wizard), /update-pappardelle (update to latest version), and /configure-pappardelle (interactive config editor).
